title: NYC Film Permits Data
text: nycsets packages film, television, production permits issued New York City Mayor’s Office Media Entertainment (MOME). provides one main permits table three long companion tables link permit affected community boards, NYPD precincts, ZIP codes.

title: NYC Film Permits Data
text: can install development version nycsets GitHub :

title: NYC Film Permits Data
NYC Film Permits Data
NYC Film Permits Data
text: Top production categories borough: Permits per day time:  Top ten ZIP codes permit count:
code: nyc_film_permits_df |>   filter(!is.na(borough)) |>   count(borough, category) |>   pivot_wider(     names_from = borough,     values_from = n,     values_fill = 0   ) |>   arrange(desc(Manhattan)) #> # A tibble: 9 × 6 #>   category          Bronx Brooklyn Manhattan Queens `Staten Island` #>   <chr>             <int>    <int>     <int>  <int>           <int> #> 1 Television          314     2404      2853   1680              50 #> 2 Theater               5      878      2431      0               0 #> 3 Film                 74      881      1076    302              70 #> 4 Commercial           58      753       968    136               9 #> 5 Still Photography     2      321       715     33               1 #> 6 WEB                  14      309       480     37               6 #> 7 Documentary           2       42        89     11               8 #> 8 Student               6       26        49     18               0 #> 9 Music Video           1       31        29      5               0 nyc_film_permits_df |>   filter(!is.na(start_date_time)) |>   mutate(date = as.Date(start_date_time)) |>   count(date) |>   ggplot(aes(date, n)) +   geom_line(linewidth = 0.3, alpha = 0.6) +   geom_smooth(se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8) +   labs(     x = NULL,     y = "Permits issued",     title = "NYC film permits per day",     caption = "Source: NYC MOME via NYC OpenData"   ) +   theme_minimal() #> `geom_smooth()` using method = 'gam' and formula = 'y ~ s(x, bs = "cs")' nyc_film_permit_zips_df |>   count(zip_code, sort = TRUE) |>   slice_head(n = 10) #> # A tibble: 10 × 2 #>    zip_code     n #>    <chr>    <int> #>  1 11222     2533 #>  2 11101     1338 #>  3 10036     1111 #>  4 10019     1020 #>  5 10001      975 #>  6 10013      950 #>  7 10023      924 #>  8 10003      877 #>  9 10011      603 #> 10 11201      600

title: Film permits to community boards (long) — nyc_film_permit_boards_df
text: Long-format companion table linking film permit community boards affects. One row per (event_id, community_board) pair.

title: Film permits to community boards (long) — nyc_film_permit_boards_df
Film permits to community boards (long) — nyc_film_permit_boards_df
text: tibble 21,432 rows 2 columns: event_id Integer. Permit identifier. Joins nyc_film_permits_df$event_id. community_board Integer. Community board number affected permit. Community board numbers unique within borough; use nyc_film_permits_df$borough disambiguate.

title: Film permits to community boards (long) — nyc_film_permit_boards_df
text: https://data.cityofnewyork.us/City-Government/Film-Permits/tg4x-b46p

title: Film permits to community boards (long) — nyc_film_permit_boards_df
text: Derived comma-separated community_boards column nyc_film_permits_df. Source rows whose community board list empty "N/" excluded.

title: Film permits to community boards (long) — nyc_film_permit_boards_df

title: NYC film permits — nyc_film_permits_df
text: Permits issued New York City Mayor's Office Media Entertainment (MOME) film, television, productions asserting exclusive use city property (streets, sidewalks, parks, DCAS facilities). One row per permit (event).

title: NYC film permits — nyc_film_permits_df
NYC film permits — nyc_film_permits_df
text: tibble 17,177 rows 13 columns: event_id Integer. Auto-generated unique permit identifier. event_type Character. Type activity covered permit: "Shooting Permit", "Rigging Permit", "Theater Load Load Outs", "DCAS Prep/Shoot/Wrap Permit". start_date_time POSIXct (America/New_York). Scheduled start permitted activity. May NA source row omits start time. end_date_time POSIXct (America/New_York). Scheduled completion permitted activity. May NA. entered_on POSIXct (America/New_York). Time permit request submitted MOME. parking_held Character. Free-text description cross streets intersections parking held advance filming. Multiple segments separated commas. degree street impact may one truck length, two truck lengths, quarter block, half block, full block. borough Character. First borough activity day: "Manhattan", "Brooklyn", "Queens", "Bronx", "Staten Island". NA borough applies (e.g., aerial activity). community_boards Character. Comma-separated list community boards affected permit. See nyc_film_permit_boards_df long-format companion one row per (event_id, board). police_precincts Character. Comma-separated list NYPD precincts affected. See nyc_film_permit_precincts_df long companion. category Character. Production category selected applicant: "Commercial", "Documentary", "Film", "Music Video", "Still Photography", "Student", "Television", "Theater", "WEB". sub_category_name Character. specific production description (e.g., "Episodic series", "Feature", "News", "PSA"). country Character. Project origin country. zip_codes Character. Comma-separated list ZIP codes production activity. See nyc_film_permit_zips_df long companion.

title: NYC film permits — nyc_film_permits_df
text: https://data.cityofnewyork.us/City-Government/Film-Permits/tg4x-b46p

title: NYC film permits — nyc_film_permits_df
text: Source data "Film Permits" dataset published NYC OpenData Mayor's Office Media Entertainment. permits table approved permits; status therefore retained column. Date fields parsed source MM/DD/YYYY HH:MM:SS /PM format POSIXct America/New_York time zone. constant EventAgency column (always MOME) dropped.

title: NYC film permits — nyc_film_permits_df
text: Kieran Healy
